title: Neuroscience Master Program Mission and Vision
content:
Neuroscience Master Program Mission and Vision

Mission:

In order to respond to the increasing interest in society and the emerging academic need in the field of neuroscience; To train scientists who can conduct scientific research and carry out projects with its expert academic staff, who are committed to ethical values, who can do creative, multidisciplinary research, who can follow the developments in their field and direct these developments.

Vision:

To be a respected and preferred, leading, interdisciplinary program in the field of neuroscience that can cooperate at national and international level.
